title: HPC Graph Probabilistic Edge v1
description: Probabilistic extension for a blast-radius graph edge. Wraps a deterministic edge identity with link success probability, intermittency flags, and provenance for probabilistic reachability queries.

id.description: Stable identifier for this probabilistic edge record, e.g. a UUID.

tenantId.description: Tenant identifier for multi-tenant constellation setups.

snapshotId.description: Identifier of the graph snapshot this edge probability belongs to.

edgeKey.description: Deterministic key linking back to the underlying deterministic edge row (e.g., constellation_neighbor_edge.edge_id or a composite key).

sourceNodeId.description: Source node identifier, matching the underlying graph edge.

targetNodeId.description: Target node identifier, matching the underlying graph edge.

direction.description: Directionality of the probabilistic edge. Typically 'forward' for source->target.

scope.description: Optional scope label for the edge, mirroring graph edge scopes (e.g., 'vpn', 'lan', 'auth-path').

distance.description: Optional numeric distance or weight for path-length constraints, mirroring the deterministic edge distance.

successProb.description: Estimated success probability of the link as a Bernoulli trial in [0, 1].

failureProb.description: Optional explicit failure probability in [0, 1]. If omitted, treated as (1 - successProb) within consumers.

isIntermittent.description: True if this edge represents an intermittent link (e.g., VPN) whose availability fluctuates.

probSource.description: Source of the success probability estimate.

timeWindow.description: Optional time window over which successProb was estimated.

start.description: Start of the measurement or assumption window in RFC 3339 format.

end.description: End of the measurement or assumption window in RFC 3339 format.

observations.description: Optional raw counts backing the probability estimate.

successCount.description: Number of observed successful transmissions over the window.

failureCount.description: Number of observed failures over the window.

probeKind.description: Kind of probe used for measurement, e.g., 'icmp', 'tcp-handshake', 'application-heartbeat'.

dependencyScenarioId.description: Optional identifier for a correlated failure scenario (e.g., shared cloud-region outage). When present, reachability tools may evaluate per-scenario risk.

governance.description: Governance flags and caps for using this probabilistic edge in safety-critical queries.

governanceAllowed.description: If false, this edge must not be used in governed reachability calculations.

policyName.description: Optional logical policy name that authorized probabilistic use of this edge.

intentId.description: Optional policy-intent identifier that produced this edge probability.

provenance.description: Provenance and freshness for the probability estimate.

ref.description: Reference identifier (e.g., Dead-Ledger entry, ticket ID, or telemetry batch ID).

estimatedAt.description: Timestamp when this probability estimate was last computed or verified.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry timestamp after which this probability is considered stale for governed decisions.

meta.description: Open-ended metadata block for tools, experiments, and annotations.
